name: Max Ventures and Industries Limited
summary: Max Ventures and Industries Limited, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells packaging unmetallised and metallised biaxial oriented polypropylene films in India and internationally. It offers high barrier films, thermal lamination films, thermal lamination films, and leather finishing foils. The company's products are used for packaging, including processed foods, confectionery, non-food fast moving consumer goods, industrial goods, and lamination. It is also involved in the construction and development of residential and commercial properties; and investment activities. The company was formerly known as Capricorn Ventures Limited and changed its name to Max Ventures and Industries Limited in January 2016. Max Ventures and Industries Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Noida, India.
